results.name: gigot sleeve
results.description: A [19th-century sleeve design](http://www.fashionencyclopedia.com/fashion_costume_culture/European-Culture-19th-Century/Gigot-Sleeves.html) with wide top and narrow bottom, resembling the hindquarters of a sheep.

results.name: gilding
results.description: Objects coated in a decorative thin layer of gold.

results.name: gives castable from graveyard
results.description: Allows you to play other cards from the graveyard.

results.name: gives castable from nonhand
results.description: Allows you to play other cards from zones other than your hand.

results.name: gives changeling
results.description: Granting the changeling ability doesn't actually do anything in the layer system, so these cards grant all creature types.

results.name: gives evasion
results.description: Cards that make a creature harder or impossible to block.

results.name: gives fake flying
results.description: Cards that make creatures unblockable except by creatures with flying or reach without giving them flying, known as [fake flying](fake-flying).

results.name: gives flashback
results.description: Gives the textual flashback effect. For cards that let you cast others out of the graveyard in general, check [gives castable from graveyard](gives-castable-from-graveyard).

results.name: gives high flying
results.description: These cards give other creatures [high flying](high-flying).
